name: Chunky Granola Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine egg, peanut butter and honey in a small saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture starts to bubble.
3. Remove from heat and add granola. Mix well.
4. Spread evenly in a greased 8-inch square pan.
5. Chill until firm.
6. Cut into bars.
7. Store in refrigerator.
